description:
Manage your IDEs the easy way

Open any of your projects in any of the IDEs with one click.
Toolbox App 2.8.1 Bugfix Update
- Fixed spurious timeout in RPC connection. TBX-15723
What's New in Toolbox App 2.8
- Fixed the bug when a tool cannot properly start if its remote project has been deleted. TBX-14115
- Fixed killing agent's process on Windows' host without admin privileges. TBX-15224
- Fixed possible UI freeze on plugin screen. TBX-15287
